title: pteris recurva
intro: Pteris recurva, also known as the Indian Brake Fern, is a type of fern native to tropical Asia. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Pteris recurva include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and even help to lower blood sugar levels. In herbal preparations, the leaves of this plant can be made into a decoction, which can be consumed as a tea to reap its medicinal benefits.
